Jurassic World: Dominion (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $376,851,080Details
International Box Office $627,153,512
Worldwide Box Office $1,004,004,592
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,744,225
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $22,270,867
Total $33,015,092
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Four years after Isla Nublar has been destroyed, dinosaurs now live—and hunt—alongside humans all over the world. This fragile balance will reshape the future and determine, once and for all, whether human beings are to remain the apex predators on a planet they now share with history’s most fearsome creatures.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$145,075,625 (38.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$185,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,676 opening theaters/4,697 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $428,028,391

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 10th, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
June 10th, 2022 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: June 1st, 2022 (Wide), released as Jurassic World: Dominio (Mexico)
June 1st, 2022 (Wide), released as Jurassic World: Dominion (쥬라기 월드: 도미니언) (South Korea)
June 2nd, 2022 (Wide), released as Jurassic World Dominio (Paraguay)
June 2nd, 2022 (Wide), released as Jurassic World Dominio (Central America)
June 2nd, 2022 (Wide), released as Jurassic World Dominio (Argentina)
Video Release: July 14th, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of action, some violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2709 (cert #53509), 12/1/2021)
Running Time: 146 minutes
Franchise: Jurassic Park
Filming location (country): Canada, England, Malta, United Kingdom
Geographical setting: Italy, Malta
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Cloning, Dinosaurs, Dinosaurs in the Modern World, Escape, Paleontologist
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Amblin Entertainment, The Kennedy/Marshall Company, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Four years after Isla Nublar has been destroyed, dinosaurs now live—and hunt—alongside humans all over the world. This fragile balance will reshape the future and determine, once and for all, whether human beings are to remain the apex predators on a planet they now share with history’s most fearsome creatures.
